abstract.text: A stochastic Lindenmayer system.

topicSections.title: Adding Contextual Rules to an L-system
Adding Contextual Rules with an evaluation closure to an L-system
Resetting L-systems to their initial state

inlineContent.text: A stochastic Lindenmayer system uses a seed-able random number generator and exposes it to the rules you create, but doesn’t use external parameters.
If you want to create an L-system doesn’t use uses a seed-able random number generator, use
If you want to create an L-system that uses a set of external parameters and a seed-able random number generator, use
For more information on the background of Lindenmayer systems, see
